underlying_goal: Organize and preserve their OmegA-Architecture repo knowledge, clean up disk space, and extract meaningful quotes/insights from years of conversation history before deleting archives
friction_detail: Initial ATTIC deletion failed due to root-owned files requiring sudo rm -rf.
brief_summary: User wanted a CLAUDE.md created, disk cleanup, archive analysis before deletion, and conversation history mining for notable quotes — all were accomplished, freeing ~45GB and preserving key insights.
